data.title: 国际服四周年预更新礼物
data.summary: [4th Anniversary Pre-Registration Celebration! 🎉] Sensei! Blue Archive’s 4th Anniversary Update is j
data.body:
[4th Anniversary Pre-Registration Celebration! 🎉]

Sensei!
Blue Archive’s 4th Anniversary Update is just around the corner!
To celebrate, we’ve prepared special pre-registration rewards just for you.

Be sure to join us and claim your gifts in-game during the event period!
Let's make even more memories together in the days to come! 💙

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3276508

#BlueArchive

![G61AkTpaMAAc0cD.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/16025/mVIEcYIe9DwY7Yn10Q1r0Xlo0JT7RINd.jpg)
